holdings.infoBox: FMTM is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Carpenter Technology stock at 4.05%, TD SYNNEX at 3.73%, Astera Labs at 3.71%, Landstar System at 3.68%, and Twilio at 3.64%.

overview.description: The MarketDesk Focused U.S. Momentum ETF (FMTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in large- and mid-cap US stocks exhibiting positive momentum. FMTM was launched on Mar 20, 2025 and is issued by MarketDesk.
